title: BEM-893 E2E dispatch selftest
objective:
Run script:
"""
Path('governance/tools').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/reports').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/audit/mailbox/from_curator').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

checks = []
def add(name, ok, detail):
    checks.append({'name':name,'ok':bool(ok),'detail':detail})

queue_path = Path('governance/dispatch/dispatch_queue.jsonl')
queue_items = [json.loads(x) for x in queue_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8').splitlines() if x.strip()] if queue_path.exists() else []
add('dispatch queue exists', queue_path.exists(), str(queue_path))
add('dispatch queue has items', len(queue_items) >= 3, 'items=' + str(len(queue_items)))
add('all dispatch items completed', all(i.get('status') == 'completed' for i in queue_items), 'statuses=' + ','.join([i.get('status','') for i in queue_items]))

for contour in ['WRK-C1','WRK-C2','WRK-C3']:
    inbox = list((Path('governance/worker/inbox') / contour).glob('DSP-*.json'))
    results = list((Path('governance/worker/results') / contour).glob('RES-*.json'))
    add(contour + ' inbox exists', len(inbox) >= 1, 'inbox=' + str(len(inbox)))
    add(contour + ' result exists', len(results) >= 1, 'results=' + str(len(results)))

msg_path = Path('governance/messages/managed_channel_messages.jsonl')
msg_lines = msg_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8').splitlines() if msg_path.exists() else []
add('managed channel log exists', msg_path.exists(), str(msg_path))
add('managed channel has task and result messages', any('"message_type": "task"' in x for x in msg_lines) and any('"message_type": "result"' in x for x in msg_lines), 'messages=' + str(len(msg_lines)))

required_proofs = [
 'governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM890_DISPATCH_CONTOUR_PASS.md',
 'governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM891_WORKER_INBOX_DELIVERY_PASS.md',
 'governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM892_CONTOUR_PROCESSING_PASS.md'
]
for p in required_proofs:
    add('proof exists ' + p, Path(p).exists(), p)

status = 'PASS' if all(c['ok'] for c in checks) else 'FAIL'
selftest = {'bem':'BEM-893','status':status,'checks':checks,'meaning':'dispatching contour can send tasks, deliver to worker contours, process them, and return results'}
Path('governance/reports/BEM893_E2E_DISPATCH_SELFTEST.json').write_text(json.dumps(selftest, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')
md = '# BEM-893 E2E dispatch selftest\n\nStatus: ' + status + '\n\n'
for c in checks:
    md += ('✅ ' if c['ok'] else '❌ ') + c['name'] + ' — ' + c['detail'] + '\n'
Path('governance/reports/BEM893_E2E_DISPATCH_SELFTEST.md').write_text(md, encoding='utf-8')

tool = '''# BEM-893 end-to-end dispatch selftest runner
import json
from pathlib import Path
report = json.loads(Path("governance/reports/BEM893_E2E_DISPATCH_SELFTEST.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
print(report["status"])
for check in report["checks"]:
    print(("PASS" if check["ok"] else "FAIL") + " | " + check["name"] + " | " + check["detail"])
raise SystemExit(0 if report["status"] == "PASS" else 1)
'''
Path('governance/tools/run_dispatch_e2e_selftest.py').write_text(tool, encoding='utf-8')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM893_E2E_DISPATCH_SELFTEST_' + status + '.md')
marker.write_text('# BEM-893 E2E dispatch selftest proof\nStatus: ' + status + '\nChecks: ' + str(len(checks)) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
curator = '# BEM-893 DISPATCH CONTOUR SELFTEST RESPONSE\nStatus: ' + status + '\n\nFindings:\n- Dispatch queue sends tasks to WRK-C1/WRK-C2/WRK-C3.\n- Worker inbox delivery works.\n- Worker contour processing returns result files.\n- Managed channel contains task and result messages.\n\nEvidence:\n- governance/reports/BEM893_E2E_DISPATCH_SELFTEST.md\n- ' + str(marker) + '\n\nRecommendation:\n- If Status is PASS, mark sending/dispatching contour operational.\n'
Path('governance/audit/mailbox/from_curator/BEM893_DISPATCH_SELFTEST_RESPONSE.md').write_text(curator, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.extend(['governance/reports/BEM893_E2E_DISPATCH_SELFTEST.json','governance/reports/BEM893_E2E_DISPATCH_SELFTEST.md','governance/tools/run_dispatch_e2e_selftest.py',str(marker),'governance/audit/mailbox/from_curator/BEM893_DISPATCH_SELFTEST_RESPONSE.md'])
ops_applied.append('BEM893 E2E dispatch selftest ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
